executives.name: Joseph Dominguez
executives.background: Joseph Dominguez is president and chief executive officer of Constellation. He previously served as CEO of ComEd from 2018 to 2022 and as executive vice president of governmental and regulatory affairs and public policy for Exelon from 2012 to 2018.

executives.name: Daniel L. Eggers
executives.background: Daniel Eggers is executive vice president and chief financial officer of Constellation. He previously served as senior vice president of corporate finance for Exelon and was a managing director at Credit Suisse.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Bryan P. Wright
executives.background: Bryan Wright is senior vice president and chief accounting officer of Constellation. He previously served as senior vice president and corporate controller for Exelon.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer

executives.name: James McHugh
executives.background: James McHugh is executive vice president and chief commercial officer of Constellation. He previously served as CEO of Constellation (Exelon's retail and wholesale business) and has held various leadership roles in trading and portfolio management.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: David Rhoades
executives.background: David Rhoades is executive vice president and chief nuclear officer of Constellation. He previously served as senior vice president of operations for Exelon Generation and has over 30 years of experience in the nuclear industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Nuclear Officer

board_of_directors.name: Robert J. Lawless
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of McCormick & Company, Inc. He served as Chairman of the Board of McCormick from 1997 to 2009.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph Dominguez
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Constellation. Former CEO of ComEd.

board_of_directors.name: Laurie Brlas
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Newmont Mining Corporation. Former CFO of Cliffs Natural Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Yves C. de Balmann
board_of_directors.background: Former Co-Chairman and Co-CEO of Banc of America Securities LLC. Former Vice Chairman of Bankers Trust Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Charles P. McQueary
board_of_directors.background: Former Under Secretary for Science and Technology at the Department of Homeland Security. Former President of General Dynamics Advanced Information Systems.

board_of_directors.name: John W. Rogers, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, Co-CEO and Chief Investment Officer of Ariel Investments, LLC. He founded Ariel in 1983.

sources.source_description: Constellation Energy Corporation Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
Constellation Energy Corporation Definitive Proxy Statement (DEF 14A)
